# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 5. Other Equipment [27000 - 28160]
#### Article 14. Cellular Telephones [28090- 28090.]
##### § 28090

Every renter of a motor vehicle with cellular radio telephone equipment shall provide the person who rents the motor vehicle with written operating instructions concerning the safe use of the equipment. The equipment shall also be clearly labeled with operating instructions concerning the safe use of the equipment.

*(Added by Stats. 1987, Ch. 1306, Sec. 1.)*

The equipment shall also be clearly labeled with operating instructions concerning the safe use of the equipment.
